title: lathyrus maritimus f. albiflorus
intro: Lathyrus maritimus f. albiflorus is a variant of the beach pea or sea pea, a flowering plant species that is native to Europe and Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, and its use in treating conditions such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of certain diseases, such as heart disease and cancer. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus maritimus f. albiflorus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
